signals.headline: Polymarket-X Partnership Officially Launches | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Polymarket-X Partnership Officially Launches | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket and X have announced an official partnership today, integrating Polymarket predictions with X data for live insights, real-time annotations from Grok, and X posts explaining market moves; this is the first product in a suite of integrations, directly impacting X-related prediction markets.[4]

signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Heat Up with High Volume | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Heat Up with High Volume | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Traders are heavily betting on Elon Musk's X post volume, with the April 23-25 market at $155K volume (trader split ~40% on 65-89 tweets, ~40% on 40-64, based on his ~27 daily average from April 17-24) and April 24-May 1 at $638K; these are among top X predictions drawing conviction amid the new partnership.[1][2][3
matched_markets: Will Trump name "Elon" or "Musk" in April?

signals.headline: No Whale Bets or Confirmed Resolutions Reported Right Now | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
No Whale Bets or Confirmed Resolutions Reported Right Now | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Search results show no explicit whale moves, smart money tips, mispriced markets, or just-resolved events (e.g., no updates on Iran x Israel/US at 100% or US x Iran meeting at 2%); focus remains on active Elon tweet counts and partnership buzz across 1,399 X markets.[1][2][3][6]

signals.headline: CAVS LEAD RAPTORS 2-0 IN EASTERN CONFERENCE FIRST ROUND | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CAVS LEAD RAPTORS 2-0 IN EASTERN CONFERENCE FIRST ROUND | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Cleveland Cavaliers have secured a 115-105 victory in Game 2 over the Toronto Raptors, taking a 2-0 series lead, with Donovan Mitchell scoring 30 points and James Harden adding 28.[4] Game 3 is scheduled for Thursday, April 23 at 8:00 PM ET in Toronto, where the Raptors are +2.5 favorites with an over/under of
matched_markets: NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Raptors vs. Cavaliers

signals.headline: X-Specific Markets Trending: Nikita Bier Out as X Head of Product
signals.raw:
X-Specific Markets Trending: Nikita Bier Out as X Head of Product? | NO | MED confidence**  
Polymarket's X predictions page highlights low 6% odds on "Nikita Bier out as Head of Product at X by June 30," with trader consensus leaning heavily against amid 1,399 live X markets and $150M+ volume; no whale bets or mispricing calls noted yet, but real-time odds could shift post-partnership.[3]
